prestazioni: ECU remap targeting the **CJXA 2.0L TDI CR (EA288 Gen3)** engine with a **Stage 2+ hybrid turbo upgrade** using a **Garrett GTD2056VZ turbocharger** (custom billet compressor wheel, 60mm inducer, 68mm exducer) paired with a **DV+ 02-0388 diverter valve** to eliminate boost leaks. Fueling upgraded via **Siemens 870cc injectors** and a **Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump** (3000 bar capable), supported by a **034 Motorsport billet fuel rail** and **AEM 30-0334 wideband O2 controller** for AFR monitoring.

Full **3-inch turbo-back exhaust system** by **Milltek Sport** (cat-delete with **GESI 200-cell sports catalytic converter** for emissions compliance) and **Scorpion downpipe** with **V-band clamp** for seamless turbo integration. Intake upgraded to a **034 Motorsport Carbon Fiber Intake System** with **K&N high-flow air filter** and **custom silicone couplers** to reduce heat soak.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valving for Mk7 Golf GTD chassis, 30-way adjustable damping) paired with **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms)**. Braking upgraded to **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers** with **355mm two-piece rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, mated to **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (custom-fitted for Mk7 Golf GTD, with aggressive front canards, side skirts, and rear diffuser) in **3M Matte Graphite Grey (2120)** wrap with **carbon fiber lip spoiler** by **Seibon**. Front bumper modified with **VMR V710 19-inch forged wheels** (ET35, 8.5J front/9.5J rear) in **Gunmetal Finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (235/35/19 front, 265/30/19 rear)** for track use.

**Full interior carbon fiber overhaul** by **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (heated, with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**) and **MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel** (suede, 350mm diameter). Dashboard and door cards wrapped in **Alcantara (Black with Red Stitching)** by **Euro-Compulsion**, with **custom LED ambient lighting (RGB, 16.8 million colors)** controlled via **Audi R8-style rotary knob**.

**Custom front grille delete** with **carbon fiber mesh** by **VMR** and **LED DRLs** from **Lux H8 Angel Eyes** (switchback amber/white, 6000K). Rear end modified with **OEM+ Golf R rear bumper** (shaved reflectors, **Valenti LED taillights** with sequential turn signals) and **custom titanium exhaust tips** by **REMUS** (102mm diameter, quad-out setup).
